name: linkedin-post-comment-scraper
title: LinkedIn Post & Comment Scraper
description: Scrape LinkedIn posts and comments by keyword or URL. No browser, no cookie required. Discovers posts via search engines, extracts data from public JSON-LD.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.title: Google API Key (optional)
environmentVariables.description: Optional Google Custom Search API key for better URL discovery. Free: 100 queries/day. Get yours at https://console.cloud.google.com/

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CSE_ID
environmentVariables.title: Google Custom Search Engine ID (optional)
environmentVariables.description: Custom Search Engine ID (cx). Create at https://programmablesearchengine.google.com/ with 'Search entire web' enabled.
